questions.question: Explain the difference between architectural patterns and design patterns.
expectedPoints: Architectural patterns address system-wide structural concerns
Design patterns address component-level implementation problems
Architectural patterns have broader impact on system qualities
Design patterns are more focused on specific design issues

questions.question: Compare and contrast Microservices Architecture with Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA), discussing their key characteristics, benefits, and challenges.
expectedPoints: Microservices focus on independent deployability and bounded contexts
SOA emphasizes enterprise reuse and integration
Microservices typically use lightweight protocols like REST
SOA often uses enterprise service bus and SOAP
Microservices have decentralized governance and data management
Both aim to achieve loose coupling but at different scales
